slides.heading: Global Logistics Navigation with Proven Experience and Unlimited Network
slides.paragraph: Connecting your supply chain with integrated, precise, and technology-driven logistics solutions.

slides.heading: End-to-End Logistics Services Across All Modes
slides.paragraph: From project cargo and dry bulk to forwarding, customs clearance, and supply chain management — we cover every link in your logistics chain.

slides.heading: Powered by Kargopath — Digital Logistics Platform
slides.paragraph: Real-time tracking, instant quotations, digital document management, and data-driven analytics — all in one integrated dashboard.

steps.label: HOW IT WORKS
steps.heading: 3 Easy Steps to Manage Your Logistics
steps.description: From inquiry to tracking, all in one integrated platform.

items.title: Ask Inquiry
items.text: Enter your cargo details into Kargopath platform, get an instant official quotation without the hassle of email or WhatsApp bureaucracy.

items.title: Book Shipment
items.text: Approve the price offer with one click, our system immediately mobilizes the best vendor network for execution.

items.title: Track & Relax
items.text: Monitor cargo movement in real-time from the mine/factory site to the destination port through your dashboard.

tech.label: TECHNOLOGY
tech.heading: Dakarash Tech
tech.description: Powered by Kargopath — Digital logistics platform that cuts through bureaucracy.

items.title: Instant Inquiry & Auto-Quotation
items.text: Enter cargo specifications and route, the system automatically processes official price quotations with no waiting time.

items.title: Real-Time Tracking & Visibility
items.text: Monitor truck positions on land to barge coordinates at sea live with ETA estimates.

items.title: Digital Document Hub
items.text: Centralized storage for B/L, SKAB, customs documents, and digital invoices. No more lost documents.

items.title: Data-Driven Analytics
items.text: Dashboard with monthly logistics spending trend reports and vendor on-time delivery SLA performance.

hse.label: SAFETY & RISK
hse.heading: Risk Management & Safety
hse.description: We ensure every shipment runs safely and according to standards.

items.title: HSE Compliance
items.text: Strict selection of partner vendors who implement high safety procedures in the field during heavy lifting activities.

items.title: All-Risk Insurance
items.text: Comprehensive financial protection coverage for high-value cargo during transit.

items.title: 24/7 Contingency
items.text: A crisis management team ready to reroute or change modes tactically in case of weather anomalies or technical issues.
